channel.title: SevenAtSevenSection1
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SevenAtSevenSection1, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Under oath and unredacted: The top political stories on Epstein this week
item.description: Attorney General Pam Bondi faced pointed questions on Capitol Hill, and lawmakers continued to press the Justice Department about its decision to reda...

item.title: Dr. Oz pushes AI avatars as a fix for rural health care. Not so fast, critics say
item.description: Dr. Mehmet Oz, who heads the Centers for Medicare and Medicaid Services, is advancing a $50 billion plan to modernize rural health care.

item.title: After a 2-decade ban, kites fill Lahore's skies during a Pakistani springtime festival
item.description: People gathered on rooftops to enjoy flying kites for the first time in years, celebrating the spring festival of Basant. The activity had been banned...

item.title: ChatGPT promised to help her find her soulmate. Then it betrayed her
item.description: ChatGPT sent screenwriter Micky Small down a fantastical rabbit hole. Now, she's finding her way out.

item.title: Rubio reassures trans-Atlantic ties with Europe at Munich Security Conference
item.description: U.S. Secretary of State Marco Rubio delivered a calm and reassuring message to America's allies in Munich, after more than a year of President Donald ...

item.title: Airbnb plans to bake in AI features for search, discovery and support
item.description: Airbnb CEO Brian Chesky said the company wants to increase its use of large language models for customer discovery, support and engineering.

item.title: Indian pharmacy chain giant exposed customer data and internal systems
item.description: A backend flaw in web admin dashboards used by one of India's largest pharmacy chains, exposed thousands of online pharmacy orders.

item.title: Nothing opens its first retail store in India
item.description: The two-story location will sell products from Nothing and the more affordable, mass-market brand CMF.

item.title: Law enforcement block road near Nancy Guthrie’s home during investigation into her disappearance
How to (Legally) Pay the Least Amount in Taxes as a Real Estate Investor
item.description: This episode alone could save you hundreds, thousands, or tens of thousands in taxes—all with 100% legal means. If you own a rental property, you coul...

item.title: Airbnb says a third of its customer support is now handled by AI in the US and Canada
item.description: Airbnb was poised to introduce an app that doesn't just search for you, but one that "knows you." CEO Brian Chesky said, "It will help guests plan the...

item.title: How to Buy Rental #2, #3, or #4 When You’re Out of Funds (Rookie Reply)
item.description: Stuck at one rental property? Maybe you spent years saving for that first down payment, and now, your funds are depleted. Where do you go from here? N...

item.title: Feds open a perjury probe into ICE officers’ testimony about the shooting of a Venezuelan man
Journalist Don Lemon pleads not guilty to civil rights charges in Minnesota church protest
item.description: Former CNN host Don Lemon has pleaded not guilty to federal civil rights charges in Minnesota. The veteran journalist is among several people accused ...

item.title: Fintech lending giant Figure confirms data breach
item.description: The company said hackers downloaded “a limited number of files” after breaking into an employee’s account. The hacking group ShinyHunters took respons...

item.title: Buying (and Building) Houses Could Get a LOT Easier (New Bill)
item.description: This could be the most important shift in the housing market in years. Something truly remarkable just happened that will impact almost every facet of...

item.title: Grand Rapids Could Become a Boomtown as Investment Money Pours In
item.description: Looking for an affordable, cash-flowing market earmarked for major development and a projected population and economic surge? Grand Rapids, Michigan, ...

item.title: Over 60% of Buyers Bought Below Asking Price Last Year, With the Largest Discounts Since 2012
item.description: For most of us, the frenzied bidding wars and constant price hikes of the post-pandemic housing boom are recent memories. That’s why it might come as ...
